Additional info from Flares and Hitsu(Big Thanks to them both <:takenotes:1357186646294138890> )

“With Kath SF 6 and Ryker “Crit equals Skey”:

Gramona is a better option than Clem for Kath. W1 and W2 at A4 is doable. W2 A4 has good relics, so you should try. 

W3 at A5 is doable, but requires “Rouse” Kath on turn 2(which would require Keyflare Gen). Mons don’t attack on the first turn. Kill the first mob while barely surviving, into stalling to burst the second mob. 

Side Note:
Castor can do W1 A4 at low invest, as long as you apply corrosion, proc relic, kill the enemies via relic+corrosion, turtle up to max.”

Hi guys, ik there’s probably a lot of people asking the same thing, but is it feasible to stay F2P and eventually be able to clear endgame content? If so, how restrictive is it when it comes to managing your pulls? Flare’s guide directly states that once u have a viable team (I currently have e2 Tawil, nautila, Ramona, and Goliath, and am sitting on 100 pure cores on chapter 4) u should just go to wheel jail. Is it really possible for D tide to get 5 whole teams of characters which you need multiple dupes of to be viable, and also get all with 2 specific wheels (all of them having multiple dupes as well to be viable) without spending any money? Even maxing out a wheel and getting 12 copies of one single wheel seems kind of impossible

As far as I know, you will be able to clear the game while being f2p, but it will take a lot of time. The game is hard. 
Same goes for D-Tide teams. You will be able to form them after quite some time.
Will you be top of the leaderboards? No. Clear everything? Easily
Look at Aurora: never spent a dime and he IS top of leaderboards
as long as u aren't like
bad skill wise

being F2P in morimens is similar to most others, just be clever about who and what you pull… but it is worth noting many characters are really dupe dependant and although we do get a free universal dupe every month you still gotta be carefull
f2p will get the resources needed to clear
That’s great to know u guys, thank u for the info. it’s both really exciting and really overwhelming getting into the game recently, and I’ve definitely been burned before by other gacha games

Oh and answering the other questions:
1) Yes D-Tide 5 teams will be achievable even under ur restrictions
2) your pull income is about 72 limited a month post story, plan around that
3) def should start pulling on Wheel jail
4) wheels can be much much more flexible than you are likely imagining
You started at a very good time as it's anni in 2 days and we'll get s lot of pulls 🫃
